title: D.Perlla Knife Set, 6-Piece Kitchen Knife Sets, Knife Block Set with High Carbon German Stainless Steel, Sharp Knives Set with Stylish Acacia Wood Block
features: Professional Kitchen Knife Set: 1x chef's knife, 1x bread knife, 1x cutting knife, 1x utility knife, 1x paring knife, 1x knife block. Store all knives safely in the knife holder. For professional chefs and housewives, this knife block with knife is indispensable.
X50CR15 High Carbon Stainless Steel: Each blade is precision-machined from high-carbon X50CR15 stainless steel for excellent rust and corrosion protection and has higher strength and hardness.

3 Rivets Construction & Ergonomic Handle: The entire knife is made from a single piece of steel, with ABS material and three rivets to reinforce it for more durability. Ergonomic, non-slip handle provides a comfortable grip, optimal weight and balance, and minimizes finger fatigue.

Space Saving Knife Stand: The knife block is made of durable oak wood, which looks great and is stronger. All knives are well organized, it helps keep your blades sharp and makes a wonderful addition to your countertop.

Cleaning and Maintenance: All knives are safely stored in the knife block. Please clean the knives with a soft cloth immediately after washing your hands. Dishwasher is not recommended. If you have any questions about our knife set, please contact us. The 24-hour customer service will be happy to help you.

Its curved blade is designed to rock back and forth, making it perfect for tasks like mincing herbs. 6PCS Kitchen Knife Set with Block 5” Slicing Knife The slicing knife has a long and narrow blade. Its long, straight edge allows you to make even slices in the very largest roasts, like a prime rib or a boneless leg of lamb. 6PCS Kitchen Knife Set with Block 3.5” Paring Knife Featuring a short blade for enhanced accuracy and precision, this paring knife is optimally built for jobs of garnishing, mincing, peeling, slicing and dicing, where control is essential. 6PCS Kitchen Knife Set with Block 8" Bread Knife Despite its name, the long, serrated bread knife can actually be used for so much more than just slicing crusty loaves of bread. It is versatile enough to cut through juicy tomatoes, delicate pastries, thick cakes, and more. Previous page Ultra Sharp High-Carbon stainless steel blades with Ultra-Sharp. Stainless Steel All knives are forged from stainless steel with exceptional corrosion and oxidation resistance. Hand washing Hand washing is recommend to protect the sharpness and glossiness of the knives. Ergonomical Design Ergonomically POM-Handle with Non-slip grip and easy to use.
